config.sqlTemplate: WITH sums AS (SELECT Attributes['query_text'] AS Query, Attributes['query_id'] AS qid, ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] AS env, MetricName AS m, greatest(max(Value) - min(Value), 0) AS inc FROM default.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName IN ('postgresql.query.calls', 'postgresql.query.total_time') AND $__filters GROUP BY Query, qid, env, m), gauges AS (SELECT Attributes['query_text'] AS Query, round(avgIf(Value, MetricName = 'postgresql.query.mean_time'), 2) AS avg_ms, round(maxIf(Value, MetricName = 'postgresql.query.max_time'), 2) AS max_ms FROM default.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName IN ('postgresql.query.mean_time', 'postgresql.query.max_time') AND $__filters GROUP BY Query) SELECT s.Query AS `Query`, toUInt64(sumIf(s.inc, s.m = 'postgresql.query.calls')) AS `Count`, round(sumIf(s.inc, s.m = 'postgresql.query.total_time')) AS `Total Duration (ms)`, any(g.avg_ms) AS `Avg Duration (ms)`, any(g.max_ms) AS `Max Duration (ms)` FROM sums AS s LEFT JOIN gauges AS g ON g.Query = s.Query GROUP BY s.Query ORDER BY `Avg Duration (ms)` DESC LIMIT 100
config.name: Queries by Avg Duration

config.sqlTemplate: WITH sums AS (SELECT Attributes['query_text'] AS Query, Attributes['query_id'] AS qid, ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] AS env, MetricName AS m, greatest(max(Value) - min(Value), 0) AS inc FROM default.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName IN ('postgresql.query.calls', 'postgresql.query.total_time') AND $__filters GROUP BY Query, qid, env, m), gauges AS (SELECT Attributes['query_text'] AS Query, round(avgIf(Value, MetricName = 'postgresql.query.mean_time'), 2) AS avg_ms, round(maxIf(Value, MetricName = 'postgresql.query.max_time'), 2) AS max_ms FROM default.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName IN ('postgresql.query.mean_time', 'postgresql.query.max_time') AND $__filters GROUP BY Query) SELECT s.Query AS `Query`, toUInt64(sumIf(s.inc, s.m = 'postgresql.query.calls')) AS `Count`, round(sumIf(s.inc, s.m = 'postgresql.query.total_time')) AS `Total Duration (ms)`, any(g.avg_ms) AS `Avg Duration (ms)`, any(g.max_ms) AS `Max Duration (ms)` FROM sums AS s LEFT JOIN gauges AS g ON g.Query = s.Query GROUP BY s.Query ORDER BY `Max Duration (ms)` DESC LIMIT 100
config.name: Queries by Max Duration

config.sqlTemplate: WITH sums AS (SELECT Attributes['query_text'] AS Query, Attributes['query_id'] AS qid, ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] AS env, MetricName AS m, greatest(max(Value) - min(Value), 0) AS inc FROM default.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName IN ('postgresql.query.calls', 'postgresql.query.total_time') AND $__filters GROUP BY Query, qid, env, m), gauges AS (SELECT Attributes['query_text'] AS Query, round(avgIf(Value, MetricName = 'postgresql.query.mean_time'), 2) AS avg_ms, round(maxIf(Value, MetricName = 'postgresql.query.max_time'), 2) AS max_ms FROM default.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName IN ('postgresql.query.mean_time', 'postgresql.query.max_time') AND $__filters GROUP BY Query) SELECT s.Query AS `Query`, toUInt64(sumIf(s.inc, s.m = 'postgresql.query.calls')) AS `Count`, round(sumIf(s.inc, s.m = 'postgresql.query.total_time')) AS `Total Duration (ms)`, any(g.avg_ms) AS `Avg Duration (ms)`, any(g.max_ms) AS `Max Duration (ms)` FROM sums AS s LEFT JOIN gauges AS g ON g.Query = s.Query GROUP BY s.Query ORDER BY `Count` DESC LIMIT 100
config.name: Queries by Count
